summary: Repaired executeGeneratedReturnWorkflow with the contract-backed priority order and side effects, without changing executeSeededReturnWorkflow.
diagnosis: High-value review now runs first; VIP damaged replacements decrement sellable and increment quarantine; STANDARD damaged refunds preserve sellable and increment quarantine. Inputs outside the observed contract domain are rejected.
verificationIntent: Confirmed with git diff --check and read-only diff/status that only the permitted file changed. Per constraints, no tests, builds, typechecks, or package-manager commands were run.
